data.title: Paxos achieves SEC clearing agency approval, a first in blockchain, signifies progress for U.S. securities settlement.
data.description: Paxos achieves a significant milestone by obtaining registration as a clearing agency with the SEC. This development is noteworthy for blockchain technology within the U.S. securities settlement realm. This achievement signals Paxos' compliance with regulatory standards set forth by the SEC, further enhancing trust in blockchain-based solutions. This event is a crucial step towards transforming the securities industry through innovative technologies.

data.title: NEW PRODUCT: New ATEX EasySwitch® Wet-Dry Vac for Industrial Cleanup in Explosive Environments
data.description: The recently launched ATEX EasySwitch® Wet-Dry Vac by EXAIR in Cincinnati on May 29, 2026, is specially designed for industrial cleanup in hazardous environments like ATEX Zones 1 and 21. This pneumatic system ensures safe and reliable operations in areas with potentially explosive atmospheres.

data.title: Ambarella Stock Slides After Lackluster Q1 Results
data.description: Shares of Ambarella Inc (NASDAQ: AMBA) are plummeting after the company announced its first-quarter results and second-quarter sales guidance, which fell short of Wall Street expectations. The stock is experiencing significant weakness following this news. In the first quarter, Ambarella reported earnings of 11 cents per share, surpassing the 10 cent consensus estimate and marking a substantial improvement from the 7 cents reported a year ago. Revenue for the quarter reached approximately $100.36 million, slightly exceeding the estimated $100.14 million and representing a nearly 17% increase from the same period last year. The company's official release from Santa Clara stated that total revenue for the quarter amounted to $100.4 million. Additionally, on a non-GAAP basis, gross margin... (The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: BTC drops to six-week lows, analyst predicts $72K as end of dip. Price action separates from US markets.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped to its lowest point since mid-April as it deviated from the bullish trend in US stock markets.

data.title: Ex-Celsius CEO seeks to overturn 12-year sentence after lawyers quit; case involves FTX and alleged "hostile takeover" involving former exec.
data.description: Alex Mashinsky, the ex-CEO, has filed paperwork to overturn his 12-year sentence. The case involves FTX and an alleged "hostile takeover" by a former Celsius executive. The said executive received a sentence of time served.

data.title: Large Bitcoin holders see decrease in balances, indicating reduced demand and possible downside risk, per CryptoQuant. (Read More)
data.description: According to analysis by CryptoQuant, there has been a decrease in the balances of Bitcoin whales and dolphins. This decline suggests reduced demand for Bitcoin and also indicates a potential downside risk for the cryptocurrency. The data reveals a situation where large holders of Bitcoin, known as whales, and smaller holders, known as dolphins, are holding fewer coins. This trend could imply a shift in market sentiment towards a bearish direction, with the possibility of negative price movements in the near future.

data.title: Sui Network outage lasts 6 hours, SUI token falls 6.6%, exposing reliability concerns for Layer-1 blockchain.
data.description: Recently, the Sui Network experienced a prolonged 6-hour outage caused by a bug in its most recent update. This incident led to a 6.6% drop in the SUI token value, shedding light on persistent concerns about the reliability of the Layer-1 blockchain. This outage and subsequent token depreciation underscore the challenges faced by the network, affecting stakeholders and users alike.
Portuguese bank reveals Q1 2026 financial report and accounts.

data.title: Coinbase, Kalshi Receive Regulatory Green Light For Crypto Futures Trading In The US
data.description: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission has approved crypto perpetual futures trading in the country, allowing companies like Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ: COIN) and Kalshi to enter the market. The Division of Clearing and Risk, Division of Market Oversight, and Market Participants Division issued a staff advisory concerning risks associated with 24/7 derivatives trading and clearing. Although this advisory does not represent a formal rule change, it indicates regulatory approval for perpetual futures products functioning within current US regulatory frameworks. This move opens the door for these companies to tap into one of the largest markets in the crypto industry.

data.title: Marchesi Frescobaldi Releases Tenuta Perano Chianti Classico DOCG 2023
data.description: A prestigious new vintage has been introduced to global markets, highlighting the grace and altitude-influenced qualities of the Chianti Classico region in Gaiole in Chianti, Italy. On May 29, 2026, Marchesi Frescobaldi unveiled the Tenuta Perano Chianti Classico DOCG 2023, the latest addition to their collection. This exquisite wine exemplifies the distinct characteristics of the terroir, embodying the essence of the region.

data.title: EDF power solutions North America Signs Agreement with Southern California Public Power Authority for Solar Project
data.description: EDF power solutions North America has recently disclosed the signing of a lengthy 30-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with the Southern California Public Power Authority (SCPPA). This agreement pertains to the production from a sizable 400-megawatt (MW)dc/300 MWac solar initiative, recognized as the Utah Solar 1 Energy project. The PPA is specifically for the Los Angeles Department of Water and Power (LADWP), a participating member. Utah Solar 1 project is situated on state-run lands overseen by the Utah Trust Lands Administration (TLA) in Mill, guaranteeing significant renewable energy generation for the region.
